title: DouNut
description:
Not too vanilla but not so far away. A modpack with 350 mods (and some texture/shaders). 
Enjoy the life of what minecraft should looked liked in my head.
body:
A modpack with 350 mods and some textures packs / shaders.
There is a lot of exploration ands adventures mods.
Don't be too affraid, there is a lot of vanilla stylised mods.
There is mods for automatisation like "CREATE" and others mod around the create mod.
There is no goals, just enjoy your next life.
